message:
Update closure checklist: all 7 gates PASS after proof manifest br-8bqme.3

Final proof manifest gate now PASS. Unresolved-item matrix cleared.
Validation snapshot updated to reflect 8bqme.3 closure. Review outcome
updated from "not ready" to "all 7 closure gates PASS".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
